description_long: This is a rustic wooden directional sign composed of a vertical post and a horizontal arrow-shaped plank. The arrow points to the right and features a yellow warning label with the word 'DANGER!' and a lightning bolt symbol, suggesting a hazardous area ahead. The wood appears weathered, with visible grain and some discoloration, giving it an aged, utilitarian look. The sign is constructed from thick, solid planks, likely intended for outdoor use in environments where durability is important. The warning label is affixed to the arrow, and a smaller yellow caution symbol is attached to the post below the arrow. The overall construction is simple, sturdy, and functional, suitable for alerting pedestrians or workers in urban or industrial settings.
description: A weathered wooden directional sign with a right-pointing arrow and yellow warning labels, including 'DANGER!' and a lightning bolt symbol. The sign is sturdy and utilitarian, designed for outdoor hazard notification.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrow with 'DANGER!' text and a lightning bolt warning symbol below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden planks and the yellow warning label on the arrow.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back of the arrow and the vertical post, with no visible text or symbols.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the vertical post and the back edge of the arrow, with minimal detail visible.
